name: jonwiggins/optio
summary: PR-lifecycle worker system that turns CI failures, review requests, and merge conflicts into explicit resume actions, pushing tasks from intake to merged PR through a BullMQ-backed state machine.
evidence: Implements explicit watcher actions like `resume_ci_failure`, `resume_review`, `resume_conflicts`, `launch_review`, and `auto_merge` on top of PR polling and worktree isolation.
Supports Codex as a real agent adapter, including task-file setup, auth modes, and structured result parsing inside a broader completion-loop product.
